title: shadcn/ui

title: Magic UI

description: Large library of shadcn-style blocks and templates for shipping UI faster with AI-assisted workflows.

description: Ready-made page sections and marketing blocks built on the shadcn/ui stack.

title: Transitions.dev
description: Practical, copy-ready UI transitions for web apps when motion docs stay too abstract.

title: Motion
description: Production animation library for React and the web — the foundation behind most polished UI motion.

title: View Transition API (MDN)
description: Browser-native view transitions for SPA and multi-page navigations without a heavy animation stack.

title: shadcn/ui Introduction
description: How the shadcn distribution model works — components as code you copy, not a black-box package.

title: Material Motion for Flutter
description: Hands-on codelab for Material motion patterns in Flutter navigation and shared-axis transitions.

title: Animate a page route transition
description: Official Flutter cookbook for custom route transitions — baseline craft for mobile navigation feel.

title: Lucide
description: Clean, consistent icon set used across modern product UIs and many shadcn-based systems.

title: Heroicons
description: Hand-crafted SVG icons from the Tailwind team — solid defaults for product interfaces.

title: React Doctor
description: Deterministic scanner for React anti-patterns, performance issues, and agent-generated code smell.

title: Kapso
description: WhatsApp APIs for developers — sandbox, messaging, and agent-friendly integration paths.

title: Oxc
description: High-performance JS/TS tooling suite — parser, linter, and related DX building blocks.

title: Biome
description: Fast formatter and linter for the web toolchain when you want one tool instead of many.

title: Vercel AI SDK
description: Type-safe toolkit for building AI product features — streaming, tools, and UI helpers.

title: E2B
description: Secure sandboxes for running untrusted agent code in isolated environments.

title: Dynamic Workers (Cloudflare)
description: Lightweight isolate-based sandboxes for AI-generated code — useful mental model for agent isolation.

title: Leaseweb
description: Bare-metal and VPS hosting when you need predictable infrastructure outside hyperscaler defaults.

title: Fly.io
description: Run full-stack apps close to users with a simple deploy model — good default for small products.

title: Railway
description: Low-friction app and database hosting for shipping side projects and early products quickly.

title: Chánh Đại — Design Engineer
description: Strong personal site and craft reference for design-engineering portfolio structure and polish.

title: Rauno Freiberg
description: Interaction and interface craft from a design engineer — sharp reference for product feel.

description: Design-engineer portfolio and component craft often cited for motion and UI experimentation.

title: Refactoring UI
